mapper.sql: t.id, t.registry_group, t.registry_key, t.registry_value, t.update_time, t.total_physical_memory_size, t.free_physical_memory_size, t.system_cpu_load
mapper.select: SELECT t.id FROM xxl_job_registry AS t WHERE t.update_time < DATE_ADD(#{nowTime},INTERVAL -#{timeout} SECOND)
SELECT FROM xxl_job_registry AS t WHERE t.update_time > DATE_ADD(#{nowTime},INTERVAL -#{timeout} SECOND)
SELECT registry_value FROM xxl_job_registry AS t WHERE t.registry_key = #{appName} and t.update_time > DATE_ADD(#{nowTime},INTERVAL -#{timeout} SECOND)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xxl_job_registry (registry_group,registry_key, registry_value, update_time, total_physical_memory_size, free_physical_memory_size, system_cpu_load) VALUES (#{registryGroup},#{registryKey}, #{registryValue}, #{updateTime}, #{totalPhysicalMemorySize}, #{freePhysicalMemorySize}, #{systemCpuLoad})
